goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'turkish' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the restaurant' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'address', and 'hotel type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve turkish food
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 3
The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant and should be in the expensive price range
Make sure you get postcode, address, and hotel type
